# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-22 | **更新时间**: 07:31 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[06:46]` **艾伯维 (AbbVie) 在 ASCO 2026 上公布新数据，展示其下一代肿瘤产品线的广度和动力**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AbbVie Announces New Data at ASCO 2026 Demonstrating Breadth and Momentum Across its Next-Generation Oncology Pipeline* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[05:05]` **Natera 将在 ASCO 上展示 35 项研究，扩大肿瘤学临床数据领先地位**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Natera to Present 35 Studies at ASCO, Extending Clinical Data Leadership in Oncology* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[05:01]` **百时美施贵宝将在 ASCO® 2026 上公布新数据，展示跨肿瘤产品组合和下一代产品线的科学创新的强度和广度**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Bristol Myers Squibb to Unveil New Data at ASCO® 2026 Demonstrating Strength and Breadth of Scientific Innovation Across Oncology Portfolio and Next-Generation Pipeline* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[05:01]` **A2 Biotherapeutics 展示了 EVEREST-2 临床研究的安全性和有效性数据，包括非小细胞肺癌患者首次对 CAR T 细胞疗法完全缓解的更新**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *A2 Biotherapeutics Presents Safety and Efficacy Data from the EVEREST-2 Clinical Study, Including Update on the First Complete Response to CAR T-Cell Therapy in a Patient with Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[05:00]` **Obsidian Therapeutics 将在 2026 年 ASCO 年会上以口头形式展示 OBX-115 治疗晚期黑色素瘤的 2 期临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Obsidian Therapeutics to Present Phase 2 Clinical Data for OBX-115 in Advanced Melanoma in Oral Presentation at 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[05:00]` **礼来公司将在 2026 年美国临床肿瘤学会年会上展示跨肿瘤类型和治疗方式的肿瘤学产品组合**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Lilly to showcase oncology portfolio across tumor types and treatment modalities at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:06]` **Scribe Therapeutics 获得监管许可，启动 STX-1150 降低 LDL-C 的首次人体临床研究**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Scribe Therapeutics Achieves Regulatory Clearance to Initiate First-in-Human Clinical Study of STX-1150 for LDL-C Reduction* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---

- `[10:13]` **🏛️监管 | 启函生物宣布 FDA 批准 QT-019C 的 IND，这是一种通用双靶点 CAR-T 候选药物，标志着开发潜在的低淋巴细胞清除、现成的 CAR-T 疗法治疗自身免疫性疾病的一个重要里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Qihan Biotech Announces FDA Clearance of IND for QT-019C, a universal dual-target CAR-T candidate, marking a significant milestone in the development of a potentially low-lymphodepletion, off-the-shelf CAR-T therapy for autoimmune diseases* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
